candidates.why: Separate operating D&A line above EBIT, but not labelled as related to COGS/cost of sales; cannot clearly attribute to the selected COGS bucket.
Separate operating depreciation line above EBIT, but no indication it belongs specifically to cost of goods sold rather than SG&A or total operating expenses.
Separate operating amortization line above EBIT, but not identified as COGS-related; also multiple amortization rows create ambiguity.

variables.notes: No explicit COGS-specific D&A row (such as depreciation in COGS/cost of sales) is shown. The visible D&A rows are separate operating lines but are not attributable to the selected COGS row with sufficient certainty. Conservative choice is to avoid adding any COGS_DA row.

candidates.why: Separate operating D&A line above EBIT and outside the selected SG&A component rows, but it is not labelled as SG&A/admin/overhead-specific.
Separate operating depreciation line above EBIT; could relate to operating overhead, but statement does not indicate whether it belongs to SG&A versus COGS or total operating expenses.
Separate operating amortization line above EBIT, but multiple amortization rows and lack of SG&A-specific labelling make attribution uncertain.

variables.notes: Manually Added. The selected XSGA bucket consists of salary/personnel, SBC in SG&A, and other operating expenses, with depreciation/amortization explicitly excluded in the earlier mapping. However, the excerpt only shows generic D&A lines, not SG&A-specific D&A. Because attribution to SG&A is unclear and there is no separate R&D row, conservative output is no addition pending manual review.
